title: marsilea cornuta
intro: Marsilea cornuta, also known as the Four-leaf Clover Fern or Peacock Fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Marsileaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Marsilea cornuta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Marsilea cornuta can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
